//: Heddle-family hooks template. Merge into your .claude/settings.json (workspace or per-repo) by hand — install.sh --hooks copies this file only when no settings.json exists. See hooks/README.md.

hooks.command: bash -lc 'f="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; case "$f" in *heddle/src/*.py|*heddle/tests/*.py) cd "$(echo "$f" | sed -E "s|(.*/heddle)/.*|\1|")" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix --quiet "$f" 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac'
hooks.description: Auto-fix ruff issues on Python edits inside heddle/

hooks.command: bash -lc 'f="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; case "$f" in *heddle/schemas/v1/*|*heddle-sdk/dotnet/src/*/Models/*|*heddle-sdk/swift/Sources/HeddleActor/Models/*) echo "NOTE: editing a wire-protocol artifact ($f). heddle/ is upstream; heddle-sdk/ vendors. Run /heddle-contract-sync after this edit, and consider /cross-repo-pr." >&2 ;; esac; exit 0'
hooks.description: Warn when editing schemas or vendored SDK models; remind to run contract-sync
